ogTitle: Catherine Field vs Catherine Hill Bay: Climate Safety

heading: Catherine Field vs Catherine Hill Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Catherine Field, New South Wales and Catherine Hill Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Catherine Field has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Catherine Hill Bay (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Catherine Field or Catherine Hill Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Catherine Field has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Catherine Hill Bay scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Catherine Field scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Catherine Hill Bay scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Catherine Field or Catherine Hill Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Catherine Field has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
